item.title: Service disruption on Claude services
item.description: [critical] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on several models
item.description: [critical] resolved — From 8:28am PT / 15:28 UTC through 9:26am PT / 16:26 UTC users experienced elevated errors on requests to multiple Claude models. This issue has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Haiku 4.5
item.description: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors across Fable 5
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors across models
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Haiku 4.5
item.description: [minor] identified — We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue.

item.title: Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Haiku 4.5
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Fable 5 requiring usage credits on Max plans
item.description: [minor] monitoring — Some Claude Code Max plan users were incorrectly prompted to use usage credits to access Fable 5, which is included in their plan. If you were affected, please restart Claude Code.

item.title: Elevated error rates for Opus 4.5
item.description: [minor] identified — The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.

item.title: Elevated errors across Fable 5
item.description: [major] resolved — This issue has been resolved, and Claude Fable 5 is available once again without usage credits, as expected.

item.title: Elevated error rates for Sonnet 5
item.description: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Sonnet 5 and Haiku 4.5
item.description: [minor] identified — The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.

item.title: Elevated errors for multiple models
item.description: [major] resolved — This issue has been resolved. From 11:30am PT / 18:30 UTC through to 3:15pm PT / 22:15 UTC some users experienced elevated errors on requests to Claude Models. Most errors were experienced within the first hour of the impact window.

item.title: Enterprise SSO sign-in failures
item.description: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Sonnet 5
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on multiple models
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Partial outage of claude.ai: container creation
item.description: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Haiku 4.5
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.5 and Claude Sonnet 4.5
item.description: [none] resolved — Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.5 and Claude Sonnet 4.5 between 6:00am PT / 1:00pm UTC and 8:15am PT / 3:15pm UTC.

item.title: Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: [major] resolved — This issue has been resolved

item.title: Degraded performance for Claude Code on the web, Cowork Remote, Claude Tag, and Claude Code Review sessions
item.description: [minor] resolved — This issue has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on multiple models
item.description: [minor] resolved — This issue has been resolved. Users saw elevated errors on requests to some models between 10:45am PT / 17:45 UTC and 12:40pm PT / 19:40 UTC.

item.title: Issues authorizing to MCP Servers
item.description: [minor] resolved — Users are unable to send authorized requests to MCP servers.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Sonnet 5
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors for some models
item.description: [major] resolved — This issue has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Sonnet 5
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Claude Tag seeing elevated GitHub operation failures
item.description: [minor] investigating — We are currently investigating elevated error rates on calls made Claude Tag. Our team is actively working to identify the root cause. You may experience errors such as GitHub operations denied.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude.ai
item.description: [critical] resolved — This issue has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on several models
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors across many models
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated error rates on Opus 4.8
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Opus 4.5
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: elevated errors on Opus 48
item.description: [none] resolved — Elevated errors on Opus-48. It has been mitigated. We are actively monitoring the system.

item.title: Elevated errors on Opus 4.8 Fast
item.description: [none] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated error rate on Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Claude.ai is experiencing elevated error rates
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated error rate across multiple models
item.description: [critical] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors across many models
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: [minor] monitoring — A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.

item.title: Elevated Error Rates for Opus 4.8, Opus 4.7, Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, and Haiku 4.5
item.description: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Opus 4.8 errors
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated error rates on the Claude API
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.
